title: Maturi Delight
description: This mod add Japanese Festival Foods
body:
![MaturiDelight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s8FllF1q/images/a2840df314062afc4064bfc212b42bc619b0a912.png)

![MaturiDelight Cooking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s8FllF1q/images/c10d8f6a83d24e475b2eb09398bfcb970eebf608.png)

# Summary

This mod add Japanese Festival Foods as farmers delight addon!

such as "okonomiyaki", "takoyaki", "Yakisoba"

Blocks to create those foods are also added. like japanese food cart!

but If you want make those you should make dough raw and put plate or takoyaki maker!

... also You can put something suspicaus foods in Those foods(Don't ask why I put this)
